# volcenginecc_dns_backup_schedule (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::DNS::BackupSchedule



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `count_limit` (Number) Backup quantity limit.
- `schedule` (Number) Backup plan:   - 0: Disable automatic backup.   - 1: Automatically back up every hour.   - 2: Automatically back up every day.   - 3: Automatically back up every month.
- `zid` (String) You need to obtain the ID of the domain name for the backup plan. You can call the ListZones API to get the domain name ID.
